items.description: Run the baseline SEO/GEO audit across crawlability, indexation, page intent, titles, internal links, structured data, source citations, and answer-first content, then rank gaps by expected impact.
verification: Record crawl evidence for local and live public surfaces.
Record target-query benchmark evidence across available search engines and AI answer engines.
Write a ranked gap list with priority queries mapped to answer-ready pages or missing-page gaps.
items.notes: Baseline found one critical build/crawl blocker and one high-impact stale indexed URL issue. See audit.md.

items.description: Fix the highest-leverage critical or high-impact SEO/GEO issue identified by F001.
verification: Run the narrowest relevant local checks for touched files.
Rerun the same crawl checks that exposed the issue.
items.notes: Fixed the docs build blocker by restoring js-yaml v3 compatibility for gray-matter, and fixed the stale /apps catalog URL with a Vercel 308 route redirect.

items.description: Rerun the baseline crawl and target-query benchmark after F002, compare before/after results, and decide whether another critical or high-impact issue remains.
verification: Confirm no critical technical issue remains or open the next fix slice.
items.notes: Local build/crawl and Vercel route smoke now pass. Live search result cleanup requires deployment and search engine recrawl; remaining items are non-critical content/structured-data opportunities.

items.description: Fix the highest-leverage remaining answer-engine opportunity by adding docs structured data and tightening priority docs titles/H1s.
verification: Build docs and confirm generated priority pages include parseable TechArticle JSON-LD.
Confirm JSON-LD URLs match canonical URLs.
Regenerate LLM routing indexes after public docs content changes.
items.notes: Priority docs now expose TechArticle JSON-LD. Builder and CLI page titles/H1s now include Bitsocial-specific target terms.

items.description: Rerun the crawl and benchmark after F004, fix any newly surfaced technical issue, and record remaining live-only gaps.
verification: Run local HTML crawl over built about/docs pages.
Check live robots and docs sitemap for priority target URLs.
items.notes: Local crawl has 0 scoped failures after adding a docs search H1. Live benchmark still reflects the undeployed /apps redirect and requires deployment plus recrawl before cleanup can be observed.

items.description: Extend the AI answer-engine benchmark and improve local entity disambiguation/source-citation metadata for brand and GEO queries.
verification: Attempt direct Perplexity and You.com browser benchmarks with playwright-cli.
Build and parse the SSR homepage structured data.
Serve the about app on a direct local port and confirm the response contains the disambiguation and citation fields.
items.notes: Perplexity blocks headless browser access with Cloudflare verification and You.com now requires login for answers. Local homepage JSON-LD now disambiguates Bitsocial from similarly named surfaces and cites source docs/GitHub.

items.description: Tighten remaining high-value internal link anchor text for priority docs pages after the advisory quality pass.
verification: Confirm Docusaurus footer links use Bitsocial-specific target terms.
Run targeted formatting and docs/build verification after the config change.
items.notes: The docs footer now links to the builder and CLI pages with the same target wording used by their titles and H1s.
